column1: On  Saturday and on Sunday he does not go to ... work.
There are ... beautiful buildings in the streets.
There are ... beautiful parks and gardens in the town.
... people like to go there after work.
In the evening you can hear the sounds of ... music from the parks.
I go to ... school in the morning, so I get up early.
My granny stays at home and cooks ... dinner.
I have ... lunch at school after the third lesson.
When we come home, we have ... dinner.
Every day my husband goes to ... work.
